nasb.text: She is emptied! Yes, she is desolate and waste! Hearts are melting and knees knocking! Also anguish is in the whole body And all their faces are grown pale!

esv.text: Desolate! Desolation and ruin! Hearts melt and knees tremble; anguish is in all loins; all faces grow pale!

cnv.text: 現在卻空虛、荒涼，一無所有； 人心驚惶，兩膝發抖， 全身疼痛， 面無血色。

ccb.text: 尼尼微被洗劫一空！ 被洗劫一空！ 一片荒凉！ 人们胆战心惊，双膝哆嗦， 浑身发抖，面色苍白。
